Our Features

Stake-to-Earn Rewards

Stake your Doge2014 tokens to earn passive rewards while celebrating the legacy of Dogecoin's journey from 2014.

Easy Wallet Integration

Seamlessly add Doge2014 in your EVM wallet such as MetaMask and start staking to celebrate Dogecoin's ten-year milestone.

Secure and Transparent

Enjoy secure and transparent staking on Ethereum's blockchain, celebrating ten years of Dogecoin's impact.

Hold to Celebrate

Celebrate ten years of Dogecoin by simply holding Doge2014 tokens and enjoy being part of the community.

How to Buy

  • 01

    Connect Wallet

    To purchase Doge2014 Token you need to connect your wallet, which involves approving the contract on your wallet

  • 02

    Participate in Presale

    Visit our presale platform and follow the instructions to purchase Doge2014 tokens using your preferred cryptocurrency.

  • 03

    Claim Tokens

    Once the presale is complete, you will be able to claim your Doge2014 tokens into your wallet address.

Roadmap

1
Phase one

Initiate the Doge2014 project with a token presale to celebrate Dogecoin and build a strong community foundation.

2
Phase two

Expand the Doge2014 community through marketing campaigns, partnerships, and social media engagement.

3
Phase three

Officially launch the Doge2014 token on major cryptocurrency exchanges, ensuring widespread accessibility and adoption.

4
Phase four

Celebrate major achievements with the community and plan for future developments and enhancements to the Doge2014 ecosystem.

FAQ

What is Doge2014?
Doge2014 is a crypto project celebrating the 10th anniversary of Dogecoin, offering tokens at the nostalgic 2014 Dogecoin price and providing opportunities for staking and community rewards.
How can I participate in the Doge2014 token presale?
You can participate in the Doge2014 token presale by visiting our website and following the instructions to purchase tokens at 2014 Dogecoin prices during the presale period.
When will staking start?
Staking for Doge14 tokens will start immediately meaning rewards can be earned during the presale. Head to the staking dashboard for all the details.
When will the Doge2014 token be launched on exchanges?
The Doge2014 token is scheduled to be launched on major cryptocurrency exchanges in Phase 3 of our roadmap, ensuring widespread accessibility and adoption.
How do I contact the team?
You can contact the Doge2014 team through our Telegram channel. Join our Telegram group to ask questions, get support, and stay updated with the latest news and announcements.
